Table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH

Card of table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH

Name

TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH

Code

TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH

'---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data

 

T_DCE2_ORDER_EXPORT_BATCHES

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

 

SELECT distinct

Full_Payload_Orderno AS ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK,

Full_Payload_Entries_Deliveryitemnumber AS DELIVERY_ITEM_NUMBER_BK,

FULL_PAYLOAD_ENTRIES_BATCHES_BATCHID AS BATCH_ID_BK,

Country AS COUNTRY_CODE,

Full_Payload_Ordertimestamp AS ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME,

FULL_PAYLOAD_ENTRIES_BATCHES_BATCHITEMNO AS ITEM_BATCH_NUMBER,

FULL_PAYLOAD_ENTRIES_BATCHES_BATCHQUANTITY AS BATCH_QUANTITY,

FULL_PAYLOAD_ENTRIES_BATCHES_BATCHQUANTITYUNIT AS BATCH_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,

CASE

WHEN TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP) IS NOT NULL

AND COUNT(*) OVER (

PARTITION BY FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERNO,

Full_Payload_Entries_Deliveryitemnumber,

FULL_PAYLOAD_ENTRIES_BATCHES_BATCHID,

FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP

) = 1

THEN TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP)

ELSE __LOAD_TS

END AS VALID_FROM

-- [remaining technical columns]

FROM DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_ORDER_EXPORT_BATCHES

WHERE

(

FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP IS NULL

OR TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP) <= __LOAD_TS

)

;

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: Full_Payload_Orderno, Full_Payload_Entries_Deliveryitemnumber, FULL_PAYLOAD_ENTRIES_BATCHES_BATCHID

Primary key(s) Target: ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK, DELIVERY_ITEM_NUMBER_BK, BATCH_ID_BK

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- PII data - The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level. --

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

N/A

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2 (use COALESCE(full_payload_orderTimestamp, __load_ts) as a reference for record versioning)

 

----------

RLS

----------

RLS v2 add join to MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER to sharing script

 

SELECT o.*

FROM TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH o

LEFT JOIN TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM oi

ON oi.ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK = o.ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK

AND oi.DELIVERY_ITEM_NUMBER_BK = o.DELIVERY_ITEM_NUMBER_BK

AND oi.COUNTRY_CODE = o.COUNTRY_CODE

AND o.VALID_FROM >= oi.VALID_FROM

AND o.VALID_FROM < oi.VALID_TO

LEFT JOIN MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER c

ON c.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK = oi.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER

AND oi.VALID_FROM >= c.VALID_FROM

AND oi.VALID_FROM < c.VALID_TO

WHERE

c.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES)

OR o.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES);

 

 

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

 

Target schema: PL_COSNUMERORDER


Check constraint name of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH

CKT_TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_


Server validation rule of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH

%RULES%


Code preview of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH

drop table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH
--==============================================================
create or replace table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH (
ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK TEXT not null,
DELIVERY_ITEM_NUMBER_BK TEXT not null,
BATCH_ID_BK TEXT not null,
COUNTRY_CODE TEXT not null,
ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME DATETIME,
ITEM_BATCH_NUMBER INTEGER,
BATCH_QUANTITY INTEGER,
BATCH_UNIT_OF_MEASURE TEXT,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG not null,
constraint PK_TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_I primary key (ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK, DELIVERY_ITEM_NUMBER_BK, BATCH_ID_BK)
not enforced
);

alter table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH set comment = 'This table keeps track of batch-level information related to individual items within consumer orders.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH.ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK is
'Order number / identifier of the order assigned to the transaction.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH.DELIVERY_ITEM_NUMBER_BK is
'Item number in the delivery/order.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH.BATCH_ID_BK is
'Identifier of the batch associated with the order item.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH.COUNTRY_CODE is
'2 letters ISO country code';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH.ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME is
'Timestamp when the order was created.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH.ITEM_BATCH_NUMBER is
'Item number of the batch.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH.BATCH_QUANTITY is
'Quantity of the item for specific batch.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH.BATCH_UNIT_OF_MEASURE is
'Unit of measure used for the batch quantity.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is active ';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH.VALID_TO is
'It indicates When the record is no longer Active ';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH.ACTIVE_FLAG is
'It indicates if the Record is Active';

Column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH

Card of the column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH

Name

VALID_FROM

Code

VALID_FROM

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH

VALID_FROM: Indicates the dattime when the validity of the record starts. As it is SCD Type 2 it's derived from the source system dates:

ORDER_STATUS_TIMESTAMP (StatusDateTime)


Check constraint name of the column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH

Column VALID_TO of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH

Card of the column VALID_TO of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH

VALID_TO: SCD2 end timestamp. Use the same cascade as VALID_FROM (full_payload_orderTimestamp → __LOAD_TS) to find the next change; if none exists (current row), set 9999-12-31.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_TO of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH

Card of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH

Name

ACTIVE_FLAG

Code

ACTIVE_FLAG

Data Type

BOOLEAN

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_BATCH

ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.9999-12-31
